summary: Fleet-Wide Dashboard Health Sparklines - All 9 backend tests PASSED, all 16 frontend UI tests PASSED. The FleetHealthTrends component correctly displays on the Dashboard with peak summary cards, metric sparklines, devices reporting bar chart, and window selector working as expected.

backend.test_fleet_health_trends_returns_correct: PASS - window_minutes, bucket_seconds, total_points, summary, points present
backend.test_fleet_health_trends_summary_has_pea: PASS - peak_devices_reporting, peak_combined_score, peak_battery_score, peak_signal_score present
backend.test_fleet_health_trends_points_structur: PASS - timestamp, devices_reporting, avg/max battery/signal/combined scores present

frontend.window_switching_6h: PASS - shows empty state (expected - no recent data)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend GET /api/operator/fleet-health-trends endpoint correctly validates window_minutes (30-10080 range)
Backend returns correct JSON structure: window_minutes, bucket_seconds, total_points, summary, points
Summary has all required peak metrics: peak_devices_reporting, peak_combined_score, peak_battery_score, peak_signal_score
Points have correct structure with timestamp, devices_reporting, avg/max battery/signal/combined scores
Points are limited to max 120 for performance
Bucket seconds calculation is correct: max(60, window_seconds // 120)
Frontend FleetHealthTrends component uses Recharts AreaChart for sparklines and BarChart for devices reporting
Window selector correctly toggles between 6h, 24h, 7d views with proper data refresh
Empty state handling works correctly when no data available for a window
All data-testid attributes properly applied for testing
seed_data_creation: None needed - used existing historical data from Feb 28 - Mar 4, 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fleet Health Trends feature fully tested. Backend GET /api/operator/fleet-health-trends?window_minutes=X returns time-bucketed fleet aggregates. Response has: window_minutes, bucket_seconds, total_points, summary{peak_devices_reporting, peak_combined_score, peak_battery_score, peak_signal_score}, points[{timestamp, devices_reporting, heartbeats, avg/max_battery_score, avg/max_signal_score, avg/max_combined_score, devices_with_anomalies}]. Frontend FleetHealthTrends component renders on Dashboard with peak summary cards, metric sparklines (Battery green, Signal blue, Combined red), devices reporting bar chart, and 6h/24h/7d window selector. Currently has 10 data points for 7d window. 24h/6h windows may show empty state if no recent telemetry.
